subcodes.first_line: O seeker of divine good-pleasure! Today, the greatest among celestial souls is one who, with resolute purpose, [remains faithful to God's Covenant] [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای طالب رضای الهی الیوم اکبر نفوس ملکوتی آن کسست که بعهد و پیمان الهی بعزمی
subcodes.subjects: @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @firmness in the Covenant, @the concourse on high
